task_completion.description: Document contains the required company and client details
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'GreenLeaf Landscaping Services' and 'Mark & Sarah Henderson' in the OpenOffice Writer document.

task_completion.description: Table is created with the correct column headers
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a table in the document with columns labeled 'Description', 'Quantity', 'Unit Price', and 'Total'.

task_completion.description: Line items from the job data are entered into the table
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 5 rows of line items populated with descriptions, quantities, and unit prices in the table.

task_completion.description: Table includes rows for Subtotal, Tax, and Grand Total
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for labels or rows at the bottom of the table for 'Subtotal', 'Tax', and 'Grand Total'.

task_completion.description: Calculated values for Subtotal, Tax, and Grand Total are correct
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the specific calculated values: Subtotal of 3,350.50, Tax of 184.28, and Grand Total of 3,534.78.

task_completion.description: Monetary values are formatted as currency
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for currency symbols (e.g., $) and two decimal places on the unit prices, line totals, subtotal, tax, and grand total.

task_completion.description: Visual evidence of native table formulas being used
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for gray background shading on the calculated numbers in the table (which indicates a field/formula in OpenOffice Writer) or the formula bar being open.

task_completion.description: Document is saved with the correct filename
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the window title bar for 'GreenLeaf_Invoice_1024.odt' or a save dialog showing this filename.

integrity.description: Agent used Apache OpenOffice Writer to create the invoice
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the screenshots show the Apache OpenOffice Writer application interface, not a terminal or a different word processor.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent did not run a Python script or other command-line tool to generate the .odt file directly.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the GUI to build the table and formulas
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for intermediate steps showing the agent typing, inserting the table, and applying formatting or formulas in the OpenOffice GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Company Name: GreenLeaf Landscaping Services. Client Name: Mark & Sarah Henderson. Invoice Number: 1024. The invoice must contain 5 line items. Expected calculated values are: Subtotal = $3,350.50, Tax (5.5%) = $184.28, Grand Total = $3,534.78. The document should be saved as 'GreenLeaf_Invoice_1024.odt'.
